entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports for Visual Studio not showing control...
entry.content:
Change these, when you build click on View and select Errors and it should list the CR assemblies that need to have their interop changed to true.

CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.CommLayer and CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ObjectFactory, there may be others depending on which Assemblies you add:

entry.title: Re: Firebase and last 4.12.107 Runtime Issues
entry.content: I noticed that the runtime version changed from 4.12.107 to 4.12.108, I generated an APK and tested it, now everything works.

entry.title: Re: Outbound connection to SAP S/4 system from BTP
entry.content:
Yes, you can implement OAuth 2.0 authentication while integrating SAP BTP with an SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system as a destination system.

Here's how you can set it up:

  1. SAP Cloud Connector: You need to configure the SAP Cloud Connector (SCC) to enable secure communication between SAP BTP and your on-premise S/4HANA system.

  2. OAuth Token Service: SAP BTP supports OAuth 2.0 as an authentication mechanism. You will need to configure your SAP S/4HANA system as an OAuth 2.0 client to consume tokens from an OAuth token service, such as SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) or any other compatible OAuth provider.

  3. Destination Configuration in BTP: In SAP BTP, you can configure a destination that uses OAuth as the authentication method. You will need to set up the destination in SAP BTP’s connectivity service, providing the OAuth token service URL, client ID, and secret, and choosing OAuth2ClientCredentials or OAuth2Password as the authentication method depending on your use case.

  4. Security Configuration: Ensure that the OAuth 2.0 authentication method is enabled and configured on the SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system as well, using tools such as the SAP Gateway.

In summary, OAuth 2.0 is supported, and the integration can be achieved by configuring both the BTP destination and your SAP S/4HANA system, along with SAP Cloud Connector for secure communication.

entry.title: Re: Database Logon issue with Microsoft OLEDB Driver 19 f...
entry.content: As the platform indicates either one will work

entry.title: Re: How can I load Report from Crystal Server 2020 in my...
entry.content:
When you install you have the option to change it, expand the .NET components, sorry I don't recall what it is exactly. Once you do that then you can add the Assemblies required and Add these to my project:

//Add these required Crystal Assemblies to your project

using CrystalDecisions.Windows.Forms;

using CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ClientDoc;

using CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel;

using CrystalDecisions.Enterprise.Desktop;

using CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.DataDefModel;

using CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.Controllers;

using CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine;

using CrystalDecisions.Shared;

using BusinessObjects.Enterprise.Desktop;

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Task Center with Concur
entry.content: For the benefit of the reader the link to the concurtraining.com site for the SAP task center documentation is no longer valid. This SAP help link will take you to where documentation is located for this integration: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CONCUR/384ace1050b34555a6fed7ad1e49e2eb/1b9360de6caf1014a1c2f9558d278c18.html

entry.title: Re: reconstruct COEP table
entry.content:
Which transactions and purge reports did you already try and why ?

  • Analysis and correction reports in CO
  • OKBA Post follow-up from financial accounting documents
    OKBB Post follow-up from materials management documents
    OKBC Post follow-up from sales and distribution documents
    OKBG Post follow-up to down payments
    KAL1 Post follow-up to reconciliation ledger

Did you consider raising a message to SAP  / OSS

entry.title: Re: Sap analytics cloud getresult
entry.content: So, you want to know the number of rows in your resultset?

entry.title: multiple different articles in same case for purchase
entry.content:
I need to group assorted articles into the same Casepack.  I cannot do this as a prepack using variants..

My company runs Restautant/food service sites in airports.  Example:  we sell Bagels.  In one airport we purchase a group of assorted bagel flavors as a prepack (12 plain, 6 onion, 6 raisin), however in another airport that prepack comes from a different vendor and it is (12 Plain, 6 onion, 6 raisin, 6 poppyseed), then in another airport we purchase from 3rd vendor all individually.  

I cannot utilize Prepack due to all bagel flavors below would be variants, and since the combination is different based on the vendor it won't work. One solution would be creating a separate prepack set up for each vendor, but the result would be having 45 different article numbers for "Plain Bagel"

Is there a way to group "single" articles into a case-pack for purchase order processing.  The vendor in the above scenario invoices us for "Assorted Bagels", if we enter each bagel flavor separately on the PO, we won't be able to execute automatic 3-way match and invoice will have to be manually released.

entry.title: Re: C4C serviceRequest (Ticket) update via oData
entry.content:
Hi Dear,

I have also encountered the same issue in the past. If you see ServiceRequestLifeCycleStatusCode is not updatable. But if you check the ServiceRequestUserLifeCycleStatusCode it is updatable. You can update with the value 5 which would change the status to Completed.

entry.content:
In the App "Manage Financial Transactions" the field cost center is blank/empty for the financial transactions.

entry.title: Re: Cost center not updated in app Manage Financial Trans...
entry.content: Please, find the solution given in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3531093

entry.title: Re: C4C serviceRequest (Ticket) update via oData
entry.content: Hi, I have also encountered the same issue in the past. If you see ServiceRequestLifeCycleStatusCode is not updatable. But if you check the ServiceRequestUserLifeCycleStatusCode it is updatable. You can update with the value 5 which would change the status to Completed.

entry.title: What is the future of the datasphere business builder?
entry.content:
I recently started looking at the business builder and it offers some really interesting features like perspektives or combining fact models. At the same time it lacks other crucial features like no proper support for hierarchies and non-cumulative measures.

The road map seems completely empty for any business builder features. Will it be completely phased out eventually or will it have a place in the future?

entry.title: Re: IGS Watchdog could not be started
entry.content:
Hi Manas,

check if the igs process is in running state. Because process gets started based on two factors, system will execute associated kernel file and read the parameters from instance profile.

 

In my case, IGS was running was running fine on 01 node whereas 02 had issue And, this was because of the below parameter set in profile of 02 instance.

*************************************************************************************

#Start_Program_01 = local $(_IG) -mode=profile pf=$(_PF)
# Change IGS
Start_Program_02 = local $(_IG) -mode=profile pf=$(DIR_PROFILE)$(DIR_SEP)<SID>_D01_<hostname> --> Here the instance profile of 02 was pointing to D01 instance profile.

*************************************************************************************

Fix: I corrected the profile name for D02 and restarted D02 instance.

Please write back if you have any questions.

Thanks.

entry.title: Solman rejects logon with SMUD_ASSERT_FAIL_ERR
entry.content:
Colleagues,

We have Solman 7.2 implemented and I access it using the Fiori dashboard. About a week and a half ago I started getting an error when trying to access Solman. I click on the "Solution Documentation" tile. The system tries to open Solman, but instead displays:

500 Internal Server Error Exception CXC_SMUD_ASSERT_D occurred because of error: SMUD_ASSERT_FAIL_ERR. Server time: [blank]

I can't find any OSS notes about this. I've contacted our system administrator. He says it's a template error, but he doesn't know how to fix it and says he must put in a ticket to SAP. I have no confidence that they will respond quickly. 

As far as I know, no one else on my team is having this problem. I'm getting the same result in Edge, Chrome, and Firefox, so I don't think it's browser cache or anything similar, but it has to be specific to my ID somehow.

Can anyone offer any insight? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
Hi Nuri,

Are you using the same credentials for setting up the trail account again? If yes, then please wait for 3-4 days as SAP takes time to clear the history for these trial accounts.

Otherwise, you can use a different email id for trail account setup.

Regards,

Sachin Dhingra

entry.title: How to Block material for plant maintenance (asset management) in S/4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
We need to know how to block a material so that it cannot be used in plant maintenance management (asset management): creation of maintenance orders, maintenance advices, confirmations, etc.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Block material for plant maintenance (asset ma...
entry.content:
The field Cross-Plant Material Status found in the Product Master can be used to Block a material from being used in Asset Management 

 

The field Field Cross-Plant Material Status and its Configuration Activity ( Define Material Statuses 102618 ) effects the following application areas :

•Materials management (for example, in purchasing and in inventory management)

•Production planning and control

•Plant maintenance

•Warehouse management

•Costing with a quantity structure

entry.title: WEb Application /dist cap
entry.content:
Hi

When I build a cap application with a ui module, the dist folder is generated but it is not deleted afterwards.
When I access it, it is shown in web applications
Why is this happening?

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Why i can insert records into standart table?
entry.content: Just wondering: why would you ever even want to directly insert an entry into a SAP standard table like MARA? Custom code should never directly update SAP tables but should always rely on SAP-provided methods to do that like e.g. BAPIs in order to ensure data integrity and proper logging. The entry your code inserted will be completely useless and you can do it exactly once. So, what's the purpose?

entry.title: Re: Access Jdbc Material while developing a Custom Adapte...
entry.content:
Thanks for the clue. But i still don't get how to address my Jdbc store in particular. My Jdbc material is called db1 the connection works i tested it with the standard jdbc adapter. So, I tried to get my connection with: 

Spoiler
private javax.sql.DataSource ds = ((javax.sql.DataSource) new InitialContext().lookup("osgi:service/javax.sql.DataSource/(osgi.jndi.service.name=db1)"));

but nothing sems to exist under that name.

Spoiler
Reason: javax.naming.NameNotFoundException:[{"message":"CAUSE","parameters":["javax.naming.NameNotFoundException: osgi:service/javax.sql.DataSource/(osgi.jndi.service.name=db1)"]}]}]}

next, i tried to get a list of all jndi services in the context with:

Spoiler
StringBuilder rout = new StringBuilder();
InitialContext ctx = new InitialContext();
NamingEnumeration<NameClassPair> list = ctx.list("");
while (list.hasMore()) {
rout.append(list.next().getName()+"\n");
}
exchange.getMessage().setBody(rout.toString());

but only got:

Spoiler
clientfactory-1
serverfactory-1
statemanager-1

So, I'm not quite sure were to go from here.

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q4 2024
entry.content:
Hi @Orla_C ,

in the fast track tenant it is basically a plain text that cannot be exported/used in a good way.

It means for the regression testing in the preview tenant there is no way to see new available functionality for almost two weeks. 

These blogs were used also to show the momentum in the internal community, to boost the adoption and keep people engaged.

As you can see, there is a demand in the community, I hope you can consider to come up with something more flexible/beneficial for us.

Alex

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud - Production Process Designer
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am trying to set up a production process where the completion of a SFC should not be possible if not all components from Bill of Material have been withdrawn. I created following process therefore and assigned it to the relevant POD - but unfortunately it does not work. I can complete the SFC even if not all components are withdrawn. Does anybody have an idea what could have went wrong?

 

BR
Emir

entry.title: Re: Legacy Learning page - Deprecation and Adoption of New Learning experience timeline
entry.content: The 2h 2024 release removes the option to hide the toggle. You can have legacy as the default view, but users would be able to toggle to the new learning page, if they wanted. I did hear a couple companies changing the label for the new page to read Preview or something to give the impression it was not ready yet. Last I heard, yes the legacy page will be removed with 1H 2025 release.

entry.title: SAP TM Strategy to Send Notification E-mail Carrier and Person Responsible
entry.content:
SAP TM Strategy to Send Notification E-mail Carrier and Person Responsible

Follow up the previous Blogs for the Alert notification (Set-up Alert Management in SAP Transportation Mana... - SAP Community), in this blog will explain how to Send Notification E-mail Carrier and Person Responsible in the Freight Document.

This step will send email to the Carrier or Person Responsible in the FO in case i.e item quantity changes.

Follow this step-in order to properly set up the strategy creation, you can find it in SPRO à SAP Transportation Management -> Basic Functions-> Process Controller for all the steps below.

  1. Define methods:

Method: NTFN_MAIL
Service: TOR_CHACO
Description: Description text
Method Type: Basic Method
Class/Interface: /SCMTMS/CL_CHACO_METHODS
Interface Component: SEND_NOTIFICATION_MAIL

  1. Define Strategy:

Strategy: NTFN_S
Service: TOR_CHACO
Description: SEND_NOTIFICATION_MAIL

  1. Assign Methods to a Strategy:

Strategy: NTFN_S
Method: NTFN_MAIL
Sequence: 10
Description: SEND_NOTIFICATION_MAIL 

  1.  Define Parameters

Parameter: NOTIFY_CAR
Service: TOR_CHACO
Param. Type: Logical Value
Data Element: BOOLE_D

  1. Define Parameters

Parameter: MAIL_SNDR
Service: TOR_CHACO
Param. Type: Character String
Data Element: /SCMTMS/UI_EMAIL

  1. Assign Parameters to a Method

Method: NTFN_MAIL
Parameter Name: NOTIFY_CAR

Method: NTFN_MAIL
Parameter Name: MAIL_SNDR

  1. Assign Method Parameters to a Strategy

Strategy: NTFN_S
Method: NTFN_MAIL
Parameter Name: NOTIFY_CAR
Param. Type: Logical Value
Number:
Text Field: X

Strategy: NTFN_S
Method: NTFN_MAIL
Parameter Name: MAIL_SNDR
Param. Type: Character String
Number:
Text Field:

After creating it assign the strategy to your Document Type direct or via Condition:

Is very important the Email will only send out to Carrier if the Freight Document have the   Subcontracting Status (Send to Carrier or Changed After Sending)

The email to the Person Responsible in the Freight Document will only consider if the change does not belong to the same.

If you want to check more technical the criteria you can see in this class /SCMTMS/CL_CHACO_NOTIFICATION - GROUPED_NOTIFY Line 81 to 133.

Now let’s give a try in the FO which I have remove one Sales Order after planning.

FO is Send to Carrier:

 

After remove Sales order 100484 the message is trigger

The email is sent and you can open direct the Freight order via Hyper Link.

Refer to 2624842 - Change Controller Strategy to send notifcation E-mail after item quantity changes - SAP ONE Support Launchpad

Hope this help you!

Thank you and regards.

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: Carry forward of Residual Budget to next year
entry.content:
Did you already

  • Perform the Open Commitments carryforward
  • Check update profiles (and Customizing)

Funds Management Closing operations

entry.title: Re: PaPM Universal Model: Parameter
entry.content:
Hi,

As you mentioned, there are no parameters or selection fields by process. However, what you can do is transfer the first activity's parameter/selection to the following activities. You can do this in the General Information of the first activity. Therefore, you only need to set the parameter for the first activity, and the parameters will be transferred to the subsequent activities.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: I am trying to get forecasting to work on our FERT materials.
entry.content: What we are trying to accomplish with the exercise is to dynamically update safety stock to create demand for Stock Transport orders.

entry.title: Re: QM Bapi add a characteristic result for an inspection lot
entry.content:
I think you will find documentation to help you in the sample code for function module EXIT_SAPLQEEM_021 in enhancement QEEM0021 in transaction SMOD.

This documentation points you to sample function module QINT_EXAMPLE_USER_EXIT in include file LXQEEF14.

This example is designed for the user defined upload buttons in transaction QE51N. It shows how you can (1)  read the detailed information for any characteristic of any operation of any inspection lot, (2) modify it, (3) write the changes back to the system.

entry.title: Re: (Job Log Entries, F110)
entry.content: Check the long text of the error message (or warning) for correct information, such as the year and control object.

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q4 2024
entry.content:
Hi @Orla_C,

Thanks for the fast reply! I think it's okay to not have the detailed blog for every release on a fast track tenant (at least for me). But the whole blog / video should be available earlier. As @alexmolotilov mentions we use this for internal communication and advertisement for new features in SAC. To see the enhancements in detail the information in road map explorer isn't enough.

BTW: Whats New Viewer doesn't contain QRC 4.2024 at the moment:

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Cost centers and distribution rules - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi, within financials, I have set up cost centers and also a distribution rule  to allocate costs (based on headcount) to a group of cost centers.  When I use this distribution rule on an AP invoice, the related journal only has the distribution rule had against it and does not split the value of the AP Invoice line across the associated cost centers.  

When I try running a P&L report for one of these costs centers, the system does not include the value of the AP invoice apportionment.

How do I get the system to split the cost per cost center?

entry.title: Re: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
Hi Nuri,

You need to activate capabilities first also you need to check in entitlement that "Process Integration Runtime" is already entitled or not. otherwise, just edit your entitlement and add "process integration runtime" as service (keep it mind you need api and integration both) if you have activated API Management and Cloud Integrations. after that you will be able to run the booster successfully. 
Hope it will resolve your issue. 

Regards,

Hira

entry.title: Re: Unable Terminate an employee
entry.content: Hi Manish , Thank you so much for your reply , there is no issue with the Pay component end dates. .

entry.title: Re: SAP Recommendation: Assignment of Corporate Accounting Principle to Ledger
entry.content:
Hi Mayur8

The ledger 4L and 0L must have assigned the same accounting Principle.

Please find more details in the SAP Help Portal Link:

Configuring the Group Valuation Ledger

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: Accessing HANA/ECC without BAPIs and Gateway?
entry.content:
> I'm still unsure of the best method to access my ECC database information.

I think you are trying to do the wrong thing... An ECC is NOT a database, it provides "business functionality", which includes much more than simple "data storage and search/query functionality": from sanity checks on the "plausibility" or logical integrity of business data to authorization checks to make sure unqualified persons cannot see data that is not meant for them... So you should not regard your ECC system as simply a "database", (in which case you could simply get an ODBC driver and access the database below the ECC system, but this is not to be recommended...)

Nevertheless, the answer to your question is "yes".
(But I guess, this is not the answer you are looking for... 🙂 The problem is, that your question is too general. A typical ECC system has thousands (maybe millions?) of interfaces, some RFC-based, some SOAP/WebService-based, some REST-Service based, others IDoc/EDI-flatfile based, etc... No one from the low level technical groups like "ABAP", "Cloud Connector" will be able to give you a meaningful answer here. First you need to find out, which data/information you want -- e.g. product descriptions from the Materials Management application or invoice details from the purchase orders of your customers -- and then label your question with the corresponding application (like SAP MM) to get the attention of the experts from that area. They will be able to tell you, which interfaces this application provides. Some applications may only have exposed ALE or RFC interfaces, others only SOAP or REST interfaces, and others both types, in order to be callable from "both worlds" (the RFC world and the HTTP world).)

entry.title: Use CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>EXECUTE on document in Citrix Folder
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I'm trying to use CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>EXECUTE via Fiori on a document in a Citrix-Folder.

The Method is called to open a document. Unfortunately, I get the Pop-Up "Z:\citrix-vs01\daten$\Home\abapdanny\Downloads\_DSR164434_13.xlsx" does not exist.

The file is stored in "\\citrix-vs01\daten$\Home\abapdanny\Downloads\_DSR164434_13.xlsx".

My question: How do I open that file?

Thank you in advance guys!

P.S: I already read a couple of notes like 3199809, but didn't find them helpful.

entry.title: Cloud Application Studio - Offline Capabilities
entry.content:
Hi community,

we need to deploy a custom connection between an offline iOS application for Image Recognition and SAP C4C Offline Application.

The connection can be via iOS ClipBoard.

Question number 1: There is a way in Cloud Application Studio to read the IPAD o IPHONE clipboard with an action?

Another question about the offline capabilities in visit surveys. I see that in offline I cannot leverage the standard enhancement (BADI) for product redetermination and classification, so I need to use product list to dinamically determine products in surveys.

Question number 2: Can you confirm that the standard product determination via rules works in offline Application for C4C?

Regards,

Francesco

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud - Production Process...

entry.title: Re: formatter function not found
entry.content: I got the solution by referring accepted solution of this blog- https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sapui5-formatter-function-not-found/qaq-p/486024

entry.title: Shape the Future: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 3, 2024!
entry.content:
We're excited to announce that the third cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative for 2024 has begun, featuring 33 new projects designed to enhance innovation and collaboration for our valued SAP customers and partners.

In today's rapidly evolving business environment, staying ahead is crucial. The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative offers you a unique chance to gain early insights into SAP's product developments. By participating, you'll collaborate directly with our developers and product managers, influencing the future direction of our products.

Act quickly! Registration for the projects is open until November 15, 2024. Don’t miss this chance to make your voice heard and shape the next generation of SAP solutions.

To assist you in exploring the projects, we’ve created a detailed list for your convenience. Check out the full list here or follow the links below to discover the opportunities available:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Composable Enterprise: Reimagining Enterprise Software for Unprecedented Business Agility 
  • Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Improve your Post Upgrade Tests(PUT) Experience - An Integrated and Smart approach to PUT
  • Insightful Analytics for Actual Costing
  • Joule applications to SAP S/4HANA Utilities
  • Monitoring End to End Master Data Replications in SAP Cloud ALM
  • New Cost Settlement for real estate scenarios (Service Charge Settlement / CAM)
  • Purpose as base for processing of S/4HANA Business Partner personal data – concept and migration”
  • Research Project: Production Scheduling using AI
  • Research: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit - AI: Field Mapping Proposal
  • Using AI to Extract Data from the Delivery Note to Update the Inbound Delivery

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • AI Agent Builder - A Low-Code Innovation with SAP Build
  • AI-Powered Autonomous Sandbox
  • Cloud Security: Improving the Encryption Key Management Experience
  • Discover SAP Build Process Automation Triggers: Empowering Experts to Automate and Extend Use Cases
  • GenAI Content Provenance and Authenticity via Watermarking
  • Investigation into a Customer Security Dashboard
  • Knowledge Graph RAG on unstructured Data

SAP Concur

  • Concur Expense - India GST handling
  • Concur Expense – Integrating Sales Opportunity Data with Concur Travel and Expense Data
  • Concur Expense - Preventing overspend through cost control, spend planning, and regulatory
  • Concur Expense - SAP Integration with Concur Solutions: Employee- and Benefit- focused Budget Management
  • Concur Expense – The Future of Expense Administration
  • Concur Travel - Trip Management / New Trip List
  • SAP Concur Solutions - Manage and track carbon consumption in T&E spend

Customer Experience

  • Redesigned SAP Sales Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Outlook

Data & Analytics

  • SAP HANA Database Migration to SAP HANA Cloud (XSC,XSA,CAP)

SAP Globalization

  • AI-supported Extension of Electronic Document Processing of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with Business AI
  • Sales and Use Tax Reporting in United States - User Research

Lifecycle Management

  • Business Service Management in SAP Cloud ALM operations
  • Clean Core / RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard in SAP Cloud ALM

Others

  • Early Talent Management with SAP SuccessFactors

We believe that collaboration is essential for driving innovation. By partnering with our customers and partners, we can collectively shape the future of SAP’s products and revolutionize business operations.

So, mark your calendars, rally your team, and let’s embark on this journey together. Together, we can foster progress, and transform industries.

Don’t wait—register now at influence.sap.com and join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 3 in 2024!

Warm regards,

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: Re: E-mail address not stored in ADR6 table after it is s...
entry.content:
Hi Aamna,

I'm facing the same issue, could you please let me know how did you solve it?

I've found out that the ADR6 table is updated if I change something in the relationship with the contact person, but I believe this should not be the way to get the table aligned.

Please, let me know if you can.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Directory
entry.content:
Hello @SoniaPetrescu, 

when I configure a new target system in IPS I have the option to select "Local Identity Directory" and "Identity Authentication" as a target system. When I understand your blog correctly there is not really a difference if I select "Local Identity Directory" or "Identity Authentication" when I configure the later one with SCIM version 2 and the local IAS URL, is this correct? One difference that I see is that the "Identity Authentication" supports the threshold parameters like ips.delete.threshold.users

Which of them is the recommended option to choose as target? 

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: Why db hints doesn't work?
entry.content:
Are you actually running on an IBM DB2/390 (db2) databse? 

(Check SYST-DBSYS or menu system/status)

entry.title: Re: How to control externally the iflow in integration suite?
entry.content: There are several different options on how you can accomplish this. Below are some examples - 1. You could you externalization parameters of content modifier flow step. 2. You Could design iFlow to use Sender adapters like HTTPS, SOAP etc to be invoked as an endpoint from external applications 3. You could create an artifact of type OData Artifact 4. using APIM, You could create a proxy wrapper on top of the conventional artifact and invoke it in a form or API from external applications. 5. There could several more other combinations possible. So, what is your business requirement. What are you doing in the in the ABAP program with PO comm channel. Is your requirement to start & stop channel from external applications. If yes, you can invoke oDATA API to undeploy/re-deploy iFlow based on router condition flow step or design an API & wrap it in APIM. So, options are unlimited. Hopefully if you provide additional details on your business requirement, a better narrowed down option may be suggested.

entry.title: Re: How to control externally the iflow in integration su...
entry.content:
There are several different options on how you can accomplish this. Below are some examples -

1. You could you externalization parameters of content modifier flow step.

2. You Could design iFlow to use Sender adapters like HTTPS, SOAP etc to be invoked as an endpoint from external applications

3. You could create an artifact of type OData Artifact

4. using APIM, You could create a proxy wrapper on top of the conventional artifact and invoke it in a form or API from external applications.

5. There could several more other combinations possible.

So, what is your business requirement. What are you doing in the in the ABAP program with PO comm channel. Is your requirement to start & stop channel from external applications. If yes, you can invoke oDATA API to undeploy/re-deploy iFlow based on router condition flow step or design an API & wrap it in APIM.

So, options are unlimited. Hopefully if you provide additional details on your business requirement, a better narrowed down option may be suggested.

entry.title: #05 - Understanding Project Methodology: The SAP Activate Methodology
entry.content:
The Importance of project management:

Effective project management is vital for delivering projects on time, within scope, and within budget. It provides structure and direction, helping teams navigate complex tasks and ensuring that everyone is aligned with the project's goals. Without a clear project management framework, projects can easily fall victim to scope creep, missed deadlines, and cost overruns.

Some common project management methodologies include:

  • Waterfall: A linear and sequential approach where each phase depends on the deliverables of the previous one.
  • Agile: An iterative approach that allows for flexibility and continuous improvement, often used in software development.
  • Scrum: A subset of Agile, focused on delivering smaller pieces of a project in "sprints" or time-boxed intervals.
  • Lean: A methodology that focuses on delivering maximum value to the customer by minimizing waste.

Each of these methodologies has its strengths, and the choice of methodology often depends on the nature of the project and the organization’s needs.

Introducing the SAP Activate Methodology:

At SAP, we’ve introduced a specialized project management methodology known as the SAP Activate Methodology. This methodology is designed specifically for SAP implementations and is tailored to meet the unique needs of businesses undergoing digital transformation.

What is the SAP Activate Methodology?

The SAP Activate Methodology is a simple, modular, and agile methodology used for implementing SAP solutions. It aims to accelerate implementations and drive continuous innovation by providing a standardized but flexible approach using best practices, agile principles, and a phased approach.

Key characteristics of the SAP Activate Methodology are:

  • Business Ownership: The business owns the solution, ensuring that the project aligns closely with business goals and delivers real value.
  • Lead with ‘Standard’ Best Practices: SAP Activate promotes using standard, pre-configured solutions that are based on SAP's best practices, minimizing the need for customization.
  • Agile, Modular, Scalable: The methodology supports an agile, scalable approach that can be adapted to different project sizes and complexities.
  • Rapid, Repeatable Delivery Steps: SAP Activate focuses on delivering value quickly and efficiently through repeatable steps.
  • Accelerators: Tools, templates, and content are provided to speed up the implementation process.
  • Quicker ROI: By using a fit-to-standard approach and best practices, organizations can achieve quicker return on investment.
  • SAP Solutions: designed to work with all SAP solutions, not just S/4HANA.
  • Six core project phases: Discover, Prepare, Explore, Realize, Deploy and Run.

Phases and main activities of the SAP Activate Methodology:

Access the SAP Activate Methodology tasks and accelerators via the SAP Roadmap Viewer:

The SAP Roadmap Viewer is a tool that provides access to SAP Activate Methodology implementation roadmaps. It offers a comprehensive view of project teams' activities, deliverables, and tasks associated with SAP implementations in in a structured way to support project planning and execution. It includes accelerator assets in document and hyperlink format to support implementation projects. The roadmaps are organized by logical categories or by SAP solution.

Recommendations for Success with the SAP Activate Methodology:

To fully leverage the SAP Activate Methodology, consider the following recommendations:

  • Learn about the SAP Activate Methodology: start with the Learning Journey Discovering SAP Activate Implementation Tools and Methodology to get a comprehensive understanding of how to manage your SAP projects using this methodology.

  • Join the SAP Activate Community: Engage with SAP Activate Methodology experts by joining the SAP Activate Community. This platform allows you to ask questions, share insights, and stay up-to-date with the latest news and developments in SAP Activate.

  • Explore the SAP Roadmap Viewer: The SAP Roadmap Viewer provides detailed guidance for your digital transformation journey. You can view and download SAP Activate Methodology assets and accelerators and even provide feedback to SAP.

  • Adapt to your project situation: While the SAP Activate Methodology provides a robust framework, it’s important to adapt the methodology to your specific project situation. Trust the process, but be flexible enough to make adjustments as needed to ensure the best outcomes.

Conclusion:

Understanding and implementing the right project methodology is crucial to the success of your SAP project. The SAP Activate Methodology offers a powerful, business-driven approach that aligns closely with best practices and the needs of modern businesses. By following the SAP Activate Methodology, engaging with the community, and utilizing available resources, you can ensure that your project is not only successful but also delivers rapid and sustainable value to your organization.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check out other blogs from the series   Customer Onboarding at SAP
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

  • Inês Moura supports with the design and orchestration of the customer onboarding journey for SAP RISE customers, ensuring a seamless experience from signature to successful go-live. As an Onboarding Advisor, Inês provides expert guidance and enablement, facilitating a smooth transition from the sales cycle to project start. With a focus on targeted project guidance and risk mitigation, Inês is dedicated to supporting SAP customers throughout the entire onboarding journey.

Having questions, comments or feedbacks? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @InesMoura or @Linh-Hoang .

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: I am trying to get forecasting to work on our FERT ma...
entry.content: Issue resolved

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors EC document Generation
entry.content: Hello, I had the same issue. It turned out the Language assigned in the Document Generation Template was different than the language of my user, so it was sending the standard message instead of the custom one.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner: Handling of IBAN with CVI
entry.content:
Hi, If a Vendor has two IBANs one for GBP and one for EUR how is this handled in S4 HANA.

How does this effect invoice clearance?

Thanks Patsy

entry.title: Re: SSM startup problem after server reboot
entry.content: You have 3 different instances sharing the same server host? If so, maybe there are some TCP port conflict or maybe lack of RAM...

entry.title: GetVariableValues not working at first display on view mode
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a bex query with customer exit variable.
We create a new optimized story on live connection to this bex query.

We have this small script on the onActive Function of the Chart 1 :

var VariableQueryCurrentWeek = Chart_1.getDataSource().getVariableValues("XXXX")[0];
CurrentYear = cast(Type.SingleVariableValue, VariableQueryCurrentWeek).value;
console.log(CurrentYear);

(Note that is the same for : Application.getFileDataSource("CVAZVJGAC").getVariableValues("XXXX"); )

When we first launch the story in view mode we have the following error message on the console : " Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'value') "
Which is normal as it haven't found any value for this variable even if the bex query is well filtered according to the customer exit variable.
But then when i change the page on the story and comeback to the previous one, now it is working fine.
I don't really understand what hapenned

Do you have any idea how to fix this issue and have the variable the first time we load the page in view mode ?
Thank you in advance

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I'm Eugenia, and I'm very interested in participating in SAP Learning digital skills initiative. I identify with several of the categories mentioned: I'm a 53-year-old woman, I live in a small city with few opportunities due to the geographic location, I'm looking to reorient my professional career mid-life (I hope to live to 100! 😊), and I'm willing to learn about SAP and obtain a certification.

I have completed all the free learning journeys offered by SAP Learning related to SAP Analytics Cloud since it is the topic I'm interested in specializing in.

Thanks in advance for this opportunity!!!!

Regards

Eugenia Aghemo

entry.title: Re: Creating custom roles for route maps in Performance Management
entry.content: Hello, There is a blog that may help located here: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/sap-successfactors-adding-custom-roles-in-performance-route-map/ba-p/13552549

entry.title: Contact person e-mail not updated in ADR6
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a contact person relationship between customer 100 and contact person 200.

When I add a communication email address for BP 200, this is not stored in ADR6 for the contact person.

I've found out that ADR6 table is updated if I change something in the relatioship itself, in the Communication section.

Do you know if I'm doing something wrong or if there is an OSS Note that I can check to fix this wrong behavior?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (CEI)
entry.content:
We're proud to let you know that your User Assistance teams in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are standing by and ready to work with you. The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI) enables our users and partners to provide us with important feedback on our product assistance deliverables, and to offer suggestions for what you want to see from us going forward.

Be a part of the process, and help us define how we drive improvements to the help assets you need going forward.

Our project is called Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and there's no mystery about our objectives: We want to learn from you what we can do better to help you where and when you need it. Registration is open through November 15, 2024.

So join us and let us know what we can do better for you.

We're looking forward to working with you!

Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Be a part of the process, and help us define how we drive improvements to the help assets you need going forward.

Our project is called Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and there's no mystery about our objectives: We want to learn from you what we can do better to help you where and when you need it. Registration is open through November 15, 2024.

So join us and let us know what we can do better for you.

We're looking forward to working with you!

Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 531 X X _ F)
entry.content:
Hi consultants, 

I´m trying to do a GR with the Movement Type 531 in process orders and I have this issue:

Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 531 X X _ F)

Message no. M7226

Diagnosis

The system could not find entry 531 X X _ F in any of the movement type control tables.

 

Procedure

Cancel current processing.

Contact your system administrator.

 

Does anyone know if I need to configure or activate something for this movement type?

My system is S/4 hana cloud public edition.

Thanks!

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Contact person e-mail not updated in ADR6
entry.content: Don't think this is wrong behavior because our system works the same way with contact persons as the email is maintained in the relationship.

entry.title: Re: after unsuccessful authentication
entry.content: I had the same issue and it got addressed few days ago.

entry.title: Populate UDFs from BOM to Production Model
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Please advise how to technically implement the following requirement in SAP Business One:

We have an UDF in Production BoM title, and the same UDF in Production Order title. The requirement is that whenever a Production Order is created for the respective product/BoM, the UDF from the BoM must be copied to the Production Order.

I know how to accomplish this with UI API when a user would select the product in a new Production Order. But this is only a partial solution, since a Production Order can be created in other ways without user opening a Production Order form, e.g. by using the MRP run.

I could use the SP_PostTransactionNotice and copy the UDF from there at database level, but since the UDFs are on SAP standard tables, I understand this is a no-go because of support policy.

Another approach would be using SP_PostTransactionNotice that writes the queue of to-be-updated production orders to a specific UDT, and then have an external application to monitor that UDT and update Production Orders using Service Layer. But isn't this a bit of an overkill for such a seemingly simple requirement?

entry.title: Re: Use CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>EXECUTE on document in Citrix Folder
entry.content:
Can't open a front end file in Fiori from the ABAP side.  Any front end file opening would need to be triggered in the UI5 code because it's based on the browser within the OS.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: What is the future of the datasphere business builder?
entry.content: Thanks, @alexander_john_berlin for bringing this up, this exactly the question that I have been having and been trying to find some answers in SAP Help docs/PAMs...nothing promising yet! Hopefully, one of SAP Prod experts could weigh in on this. Arun

entry.title: Re: CCM Type - 0SF1 - Sales Rebate Fixed Amount, Delta Accrual posting error for Profit center
entry.content: This does not look like a SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition question. Please remove the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition tag. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: KOSRLIST_PR
entry.content: Please let me know the solution what you got for this. I also have same issue

entry.title: API Freight Order or CDS (with Loading Location and Unloading location)
entry.content:
On Business Accelerator Hub, I cannot find the information for CDS OR API:
- Location Loacation
- Unloading Location

 

Can you help me with some recommendations?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: API Freight Order or CDS (with Loading Location and U...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have the API_FREIGHTORDER OData API, which can be used to retrieve Stop data, including the Location and the Stop Role.

Regarding CDS views, we have the I_FreightOrder*TP BO Interface Views, which are released for developer extensibility. This also includes the I_FreightOrderStopTP view which can be used to retrieve the Location and the Stop Role.

With the next Cloud Release, we will also C1 release the I_TransportationOrderStop_2 CDS basic view, which could be helpful for you in the future too.

 

I hope this helps!

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: Don, I restructured all in one single page just to closely resemble the KBA for another, as well as made as very simple bare bones as possible to make it simple. Still, as said before, the user input is taken programatically by the web form and then used to set the report parameter accordingly. I have gave i another try, this time with CrystalReportViewer1.EnableParameterPrompt = true as you said. The first time the report is run, say the inpout is 100, which is used to generate the dataset accoridngly, and to set the param to the report. The report renders fine , and you can see it used the 100 param. when clicking next page in the report, the "please wait while the document is being processed" spinning wheel appears forever. One has to close the browser. The report is actually very simple, but has a lot of rows (~77K). I am going to use NPOI instead since CR viewer is not working for me in this case. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: Here is the entire code, very much simplified as said before. using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using System.Web; using System.Globalization; using System.Data; using System.Data.SqlClient; using System.Reflection; using System.Text; using CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine; public partial class reports_T980010 : System.Web.UI.Page { String sYear = null; // Total count of qualifying students. // This is used to show in the execution report int mQualifyingStudentCount = 0; protected ReportDocument crReportDocument; protected List<ReportParam> reportParams; protected DataSet reportDataset; protected void Page_Init(object sender, EventArgs e) { Utils.doDebug("Page_Init() IsPostBack? " + IsPostBack.ToString()); if (IsPostBack) { crReportDocument = (ReportDocument)Session["Report"]; CrystalReportViewer1.ReportSource = crReportDocument; } } protected void btnReportSubmit_Click(object sender, EventArgs e) { String methodName = MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().DeclaringType + "." + MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name; int i= 1; try { bool isSessionNull = Session["Report"] == null; Utils.doDebug("btnReportSubmit_Click() isSessionNull? " + isSessionNull.ToString()); if (Session["Report"] == null) { crReportDocument = new ReportDocument(); // crviewer preferences CrystalReportViewer1.ToolPanelView = CrystalDecisions.Web.ToolPanelViewType.None; CrystalReportViewer1.HasToggleGroupTreeButton = false; CrystalReportViewer1.HasToggleParameterPanelButton = false; CrystalReportViewer1.HasPageNavigationButtons = true; CrystalReportViewer1.EnableDrillDown = false; // CrystalReportViewer1.ReuseParameterValuesOnRefresh = true; // 10/15/24 CrystalReportViewer1.EnableParameterPrompt = true; i = 2; // load report string reportViewUrl = @"~/reports/T980010Report.rpt"; String reportFullPathName = HttpContext.Current.Server.MapPath(reportViewUrl); crReportDocument.Load(reportFullPathName); i = 3; sYear = Utils.getNonNullString(txtYear.Text); // get user input reportDataset = generateReportDataSet(sYear); //generate corresponding dataset i = 4; // set report datasource crReportDocument.SetDataSource(reportDataset.Tables[0]); // set report params AFTER setting the report DataSource // to prevent the "missing parameter Value" error. reportParams = new List<ReportParam>(); string p_test = mQualifyingStudentCount.ToString(); // loses value i = 6; crReportDocument.SetParameterValue("p_test", p_test); i = 7; // Add report to the session Session.Add("Report", crReportDocument); i = 8; // set crviewer report source CrystalReportViewer1.ReportSource = crReportDocument; // show report } else { i = 10; crReportDocument = (ReportDocument)Session["Report"]; i = 20; CrystalReportViewer1.ReportSource = crReportDocument; // show report } } catch (Exception ex) { Utils.doDebug("Exception caught in " + methodName + ": " + ex.Message + " . line: " + i.ToString()); } } protected DataSet generateReportDataSet(string strYear) { String methodName = MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().DeclaringType + "." + MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name; DataSet ds = null; try { ds = buildDatasetStructure(); DataTable dt = ds.Tables[0]; populateData(strYear, ref dt); // transferFileS3(mOutputFileShortName); } catch (Exception ex) { Utils.doDebug("Exception caught in " + methodName + ": " + ex.Message); } return ds; } void populateData(string strYear, ref DataTable dt) { String methodName = MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().DeclaringType + "." + MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name; String errMessage = String.Empty; DataTable dtResults = null; try { dtResults = obtainUniversePopulationData(strYear); mQualifyingStudentCount = dtResults.Rows.Count; DataRow row = null; DataRow dr = null; String dataLine = String.Empty; for (int i = 0; i <= mQualifyingStudentCount - 1; i++) { // read the row row = dtResults.Rows[i]; dataLine = Utils.getNonNullString(row["STC_PERSON_ID"]); // create the row dr = dt.NewRow(); dr["STC_PERSON_ID"] = dataLine; // add row to the report data table dt.Rows.Add(dr); } } catch (Exception ex) { Utils.doDebug("Exception caught in " + methodName + ": " + ex.Message); } } protected void Page_UnLoad(object sender, EventArgs e) { try { crReportDocument.Close(); crReportDocument.Dispose(); } catch { } } private DataTable obtainUniversePopulationData(string p_year) { MethodBase method = MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod(); String methodName = method.DeclaringType + "." + method.Name; SqlConnection cn = null; DataSet ds = null; SqlCommand cmd = null; StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); DataTable dtResults = new DataTable(); try { cn = Lib.openDatatelConnection(false); sb.Append("SELECT TOP ").Append(p_year).Append(" ID AS STC_PERSON_ID FROM PERSON WITH (NOLOCK) "); string sql = sb.ToString(); cmd = Utils.getCommand(cn, sql); ds = Lib.getDataSet(cmd); dtResults = ds.Tables[0]; } catch (Exception ex){ Utils.doDebug("Exception caught in " + methodName + ": " + ex.Message); } finally { Utils.closeConnection(ref cn); } return dtResults; } private DataSet buildDatasetStructure() { DataTable dt = new DataTable(); dt.Columns.Add(new DataColumn("STC_PERSON_ID")); DataSet ds = new DataSet(); ds.Tables.Add(dt); return ds; } }

entry.title: Re: Why db hints doesn't work?
entry.content: That must be the issue! (DB2 for DB2/390, DB6 for DB2/UDB).

entry.title: Re: Why i can insert records into standart table?
entry.content: That must be missing from the SQL trace for some reasons. An implicit database commit is part of dialog concept for managing rollin/rollout of memory.
